context_for_next_testing_agent: ReturnSettlementPage.jsx document generation buttons fully implemented and tested. Settlement Act modal works correctly with amount input, note textarea, preview and print buttons. Backend settlement-act endpoints at /api/documents/settlement-act/{order_id}/preview and /pdf work with manager override (final_amount, manager_note params). Return Act uses /api/documents/generate endpoint. UI testing requires localStorage token injection for authentication.
